mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_pass_record (user_id, username, has_vehicle, plate_number, paid, issue_time, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{hasVehicle}, #{plateNumber}, #{paid}, #{issueTime}, #{expireTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT tpr.*, u.avatar_url as avatar FROM travel_pass_record tpr LEFT JOIN user u ON tpr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tpr.id = #{id}

SELECT tpr.*, u.avatar_url as avatar, u.nickname FROM travel_pass_record tpr LEFT JOIN user u ON tpr.user_id = u.user_id
AND tpr.status = #{status}
AND (tpr.username LIKE concat('%', #{username}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE concat('%', #{username}, '%'))
ORDER BY tpr.issue_time DESC
SELECT tpr.*, u.avatar_url as avatar, u.nickname FROM travel_pass_record tpr LEFT JOIN user u ON tpr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tpr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tpr.issue_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_pass_record SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'ISSUED' AND expire_time < NOW()
UPDATE travel_pass_record SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ISSUED'
